IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: MENTIS PROVIDES BILINGUAL PROFESSIONAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES TO PEOPLE THROUGHOUT THE COUNTY OF EVERY AGE STAGE AND INCOME LEVEL.
IRS990.MissionDesc: MENTIS IS A BI-LINGUAL AND PROFESSIONAL PROVIDER OF MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES THROUGHOUT NAPA COUNTY TO PEOPLE OF EVERY AGE STAGE AND INCOME LEVEL. OUR MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES ARE DESIGNED TO SUPPORT INDIVIDUALS AND FAMILIES EXPERIENCING EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND DISRUPTED DAILY FUNCTIONING AT HOME WORK SCHOOL AND IN THE COMMUNITY. OUR PROGRAMS SERVE OVER 775 PEOPLE EACH YEAR SPANNING THE AGE ETHNICITY GEOGRAPHICAL LOCATION AND ECONOMIC STATUS OF THE LOCAL POPULATION. WE COLLABORATE WITH OTHER AGENCIES ADVOCATE FOR CHANGE MAINTAIN OUR FINANCIAL VIABILITY AND TAKE RESPONSIBILITY FOR ALL THAT WE DO.
IRS990.Desc: ADULT PROGRAMS: DURING THE 2023 TAX YEAR MENTIS PROVIDED EARLY INTERVENTION PROGRAMS OUTPATIENT SERVICES AND RESIDENTIAL SERVICES TO ADULTS. SEVENTY-FIVE INDIVIDUALS RECEIVED THERAPY OR CASE MANAGEMENT SERVICES THROUGH THE HEALTHY MINDS HEALTHY AGING PROGRAM WHICH IS UNIQUELY DESIGNED FOR OLDER ADULTS AND THEIR SPECIFIC LIFE CONCERNS. 1,044 OLDER ADULTS WERE REACHED THROUGH OUR OUTREACH EFFORTS AND WERE PROVIDED WITH INFORMATION ON RESOURCES AND PARTICIPATED IN CONNECTION BUILDING ACTIVITIES. OUTPATIENT SERVICES PROVIDE ACCESS TO MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT REGARDLESS OF ONES ABILITY TO PAY TO DEVELOP THE SKILLS TO COPE WITH DIFFICULT LIFE EVENTS OR ISSUES MAKING LIFE BETTER FOR OUR COMMUNITY MEMBERS AND THOSE AROUND THEM. MENTIS SERVED OVER 250 CLIENTS THROUGH THESE OUTPATIENT SERVICES. THE RESIDENTIAL SERVICES PROVIDE AFFORDABLE SAFE AND SUPPORTIVE HOUSING ENVIRONMENTS THAT ALLOW CLIENTS TO OVERCOME BARRIERS THAT CAN STAND IN THE WAY OF ACHIEVING GREATER STABILITY.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: YOUTH PROGRAMS: DURING THE 2023 TAX YEAR MENTIS PROVIDED EARLY INTERVENTION PROGRAMS AND OUTPATIENT SERVICES TO YOUTH. OVER 450 INDIVIDUALS WERE SERVED THROUGH SCHOOL-BASED THERAPY PROGRAMS AT 20 SITES.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: PREVENTION PROGRAMS: DURING THE 2023 TAX YEAR MENTIS PREVENTION PROGRAMS INCLUDED SUPPORTIVE WELLNESS CAFES THAT TAUGHT WELLNESS AND COPING TOOLS VIA EVIDENCE-BASED CURRICULUMS TO 1,302 YOUTH AND 35 ADULTS; QUESTION PERSUADE REFER SUICIDE PREVENTION TRAININGS TO 138 YOUTH AND 629 ADULTS TEACHING THEM TO RECOGNIZE THE WARNING SIGNS OF A SUICIDE CRISIS AND REFER COMMUNITY MEMBERS AT RISK TO RESOURCES; OUTREACH EVENTS THAT CONNECTED 1,340 YOUTH AND 348 ADULTS TO BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCES; YOUTH ENGAGEMENT AND EMPOWERMENT OPPORTUNITIES THROUGH OUR TEENS CONNECT PROGRAM THAT REACHED 348 TEENAGERS AND YOUNG ADULTS FOR A TOTAL OF 3,792 COMMUNITY MEMBERS SERVED THROUGH PREVENTION PROGRAMS.

OtherLiabilitiesOrgGrp.Desc: RIGHT OF USE OPERATING LEASE LIABILITY

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION HAS TAKEN NO UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS UNDER FIN48.

THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT REGULARLY PROVIDE GRANTS AND OTHER ASSISTANCE TO OTHER ORGANIZATIONS. THE PROPERTY DONATED IN THE CURRENT YEAR WAS BOARD APPROVED AND THE ORGANIZATION MONITORS THAT THE PROPERTY IS USED FOR ITS TAX EXEMPT PURPOSE.
A FULL COPY OF THE FORM 990 IS PROVIDED TO THE ENTIRE BOARD PRIOR TO FILING WITH THE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE.

EACH DIRECTOR OFFICER AND MEMBERS OF COMMITTEES WITH GOVERNING BOARD DELEGATED POWERS ANNUALLY MUST SIGN A STATEMENT WHICH AFFIRMS THAT EACH PERSON HAS RECEIVED A COPY OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY HAS READ AND UNDERSTANDS THE POLICY HAS AGREED TO COMPLY WITH THE POLICY AND UNDERSTANDS THAT THE ORGANIZATION IS TAX EXEMPT AND IN ORDER TO MAINTAIN ITS FEDERAL TAX EXEMPTION IT MUST ENGAGE PRIMARILY IN ACTIVITIES CONSISTENT WITH ITS PURPOSE.

MENTIS CEO COMPENSATION STRATEGY REFLECTS A STRONG DESIRE TO PAY EQUITABLY WHILE ALSO OVERSEEING FISCAL STEWARDSHIP OF THE AGENCY AS A WHOLE. OUR GOAL IS TO BE IN THE MEDIAN SALARY RANGE OF NORTH BAY EXECUTIVE DIRECTORS ASSUMING JOB PERFORMANCE MERITS SUCH SALARY. TO SET COMPENSATION WE RELY ON A VARIETY OF FACTORS SUCH AS SECONDARY SOURCES THE ANNUAL NONPROFIT COMPENSATION STUDY PRODUCED BY NONPROFIT COMPENSATION ASSOCIATES INC. USING FAIRPAY A NONPROFIT SALARY AND BENEFITS MODEL AND SOFTWARE. THE CURRENT TALENT MARKET AND OUR OWN PROGRAMMATIC SUCCESS IN ANY GIVEN YEAR. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS AT MENTIS DOES HAVE THE ABILITY TO SET THE CEO SALARY LEVEL BELOW OR ABOVE THE MEDIAN RANGE BASED UPON THE FACTORS MENTIONED ABOVE WHILE ALSO CONSIDERING TENURE AT THE AGENCY AND EXPERIENCE AT THE CEO LEVEL. EACH FEBRUARY THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE CONDUCTS A PERFORMANCE REVIEW WITH THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. AT THAT TIME THE COMMITTEE MAKES A RECOMMENDATION TO THE BOARD AT LARGE FOR A POSSIBLE INCREASE IN COMPENSATION. THIS IS PUT TO A BOARD VOTE IN MARCH-APRIL IN TIME TO ALLOW ANY INCREASE TO BE PLANNED FOR IN MENTIS UPCOMING JULY 1 FY BUDGET.
